name: My Kind Of Bank, National Association
description_short: My Kind of Bank is a community bank serving Minnesota's Lakes Country since 1903, offering FDIC-insured checking, savings, credit cards, mortgages, and personal loans.
description_long:
My Kind of Bank, National Association is a regional bank with deep roots in Minnesota's Lakes Country, having served the community continuously since 1903. The institution positions itself as a local alternative to larger national banks, emphasizing personal relationships and community knowledge. The bank is FDIC-insured and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing deposit protection up to applicable limits.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of consumer and business banking products. On the deposit side, they provide multiple checking account tiers (My Kind Of Cash Checking, My Kind Of Cash Back Checking, Basic Checking, Silver Wings Club Checking, My Kind Of Youth Checking), savings products (Passbook Savings, 1st Savers Club, Money Market Accounts), certificates of deposit, and retirement accounts (IRAs, HSAs). Their lending products include personal loans, auto loans, home mortgages, home equity loans and lines of credit, and construction lines of credit. They also issue personal and business credit cards with rewards programs, featuring a promotion of 0% APR for 6 months on new Visa rewards cards. Digital banking services include mobile wallet, bill pay, fund transfers, and digital check image review.

What distinguishes My Kind of Bank is its emphasis on local ownership and community integration. They highlight "friendly lenders who live down the street" and position themselves as mortgage experts with local expertise. The bank operates multiple branches across the region (Battle Lake, Evansville, Henning, Ottertail locations mentioned) and maintains community involvement through scholarship programs (Battle Lake and Evansville scholarships noted). Their rewards checking accounts promise no monthly maintenance fees and cash rewards options.

As a traditional community bank, My Kind of Bank likely offers competitive personal service and local decision-making, though they may not match the promotional rates or technology features of larger national banks or digital-first institutions. Their geographic limitation to Minnesota's Lakes Country means they serve a specific regional market rather than operating nationally. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal and business checking accounts with rewards options
Savings accounts (Passbook, 1st Savers Club, Money Market Accounts)
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with special rates
Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs) and Health Savings Accounts (HSAs)
Home mortgages, home equity loans, and home equity lines of credit
Business checking, business savings, and business money market accounts
Business and agricultural loans including SBA small business loans
Personal and business credit cards with rewards programs
Digital banking with mobile wallet, bill pay, and check image review
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with full U.S. government backing
Multiple checking account options with no monthly maintenance fees on rewards checking
0% APR for 6 months on new Visa rewards credit cards
High-yield savings option at 4.09% APY on balances up to $35,000
Full suite of lending products including mortgages, personal loans, auto loans, and business financing
Local community bank with branches across Minnesota's Lakes Country and deep regional expertise
cons: Limited to Minnesota's Lakes Country region; not available nationally
Website does not clearly display APRs, fees, or rate comparisons for most products
No mention of online-only or mobile banking advantages compared to traditional banks
Limited information about business loan terms, SBA loan specifics, or equipment financing rates
Community bank model may result in fewer ATMs and branch locations than national competitors
best_for: Minnesota residents in the Lakes Country region seeking personalized local banking relationships
Small business owners and farmers looking for equipment, livestock, or agricultural loans with local decision-makers
Homebuyers in the region interested in mortgage products with local mortgage expertise
Customers prioritizing FDIC-insured deposits and community reinvestment over digital-only banking
diagnosis: My Kind of Bank is best for Minnesota residents in the Lakes Country region who value personal relationships, local decision-making, and community banking. The main caveat is geographic limitation—the bank operates only in a specific Minnesota region, making it inaccessible for customers outside that area seeking local branch access and in-person service.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
